description: As the perfect gift for your special someone, or a delicious self-indulgence, this watch from guess is fashioned for the woman of style. Snazz up your wardrobe with this delectable piece. Wear it with a simple outfit or a blingy ensemble, for understated class or over-the-top glam. Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with two rows of Swarovski crystals encrusted in the bezel Features day and date in the white dial Analogue time indication with quartz movement of time display White metal strap with press button clasp mineral glass over the dial Screw to reset time Waterproof up to 30 metres usable while washing hands or in mild rain Comes in original GUESS box
